creator: tg@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported, thanks. 

I split up the patch into smaller pieces, one for each patched file. 
This makes it easier to correct a patch (see patch-aa for an example). 

Also, please check the copyright next time. Scilab has restrictions 
on commercial redistribution. Distributing the package via FTP seems 
to be OK.
